arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Dortmund – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona take a commanding lead into the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final with Borussia Dortmund tonight. The Spanish side thrashed Dortmund in the first encounter last week, as goals from Raphinha, Robert Lewandowski and Lamine Yamal led to a 4-0 win. arts.ttl: Flick admits to doubts over Olmo and Iñigo for Dortmund clash
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick admitted to having doubts about the participation of Dani Olmo and Iñigo Martínez in Tuesday’s Champions League quarter-final second leg against Borussia Dortmund. Flick was also asked if he’s willing to leave out Iñigo, who is at risk of a suspension for the first leg of the semis if he gets one more yellow card.
